channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-11
item.description: 1. Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation — Uplift / HTE · score 68 · arXiv stat.ML · George Panagopoulos 2. What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Muheng Li, Jian Qian, Wenlong Mou 3. When Can Digital Personas Reliably Approximate Human Survey Findings? — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Mumin Jia, Yilin Chen, Divya Sharma, Jairo Diaz-Rodriguez 4. Extended Wasserstein-GAN Approach to Causal Distribution Learning: Density-Free Estimation and Minimax Optimality — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Shu Tamano, Masaaki Imaizumi 5. Sample size and power calculations for causal inference with time-to-event outcomes — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ME · Chengxin Yang, Bo Liu, Fan Li

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-09
item.description: 1. A Comment on: “Fisher–Schultz Lecture: Generic Machine Learning Inference on Heterogeneous Treatment Effects in Randomized… — Uplift / HTE · score 100 · Semantic Scholar: Stefan Wager treatment effects · Stefan Wager 2. Average Treatment Effects in the Presence of Interference — Experimentation · score 98 · Semantic Scholar: Stefan Wager treatment effects · Yuchen Hu, Shuangning Li, Stefan Wager 3. Title Sparsity Double Robust Inference of Average Treatment Effects Permalink — Causal Inference · score 94 · Semantic Scholar: Stefan Wager treatment effects · Stefan Wager, Yinchu Zhu 4. Causal Conference Program 2016 Causal Conference Titles and Abstracts Title: Efficient Inference of Average Treatment Effects in… — Causal Inference · score 94 · Semantic Scholar: Stefan Wager treatment effects · M. Laan, Stefan Wager, Sherri RoseMark, vander Laan et al. (15 authors) 5. A Paradox from Randomization-Based Causal Inference 1 — Causal Inference · score 94 · Semantic Scholar: Peng Ding causal inference · Peng Ding

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-08
item.description: 1. Causal Imitation for Markov Decision Processes: a Partial Identification Approach — Other · score 90 · Semantic Scholar: Elias Bareinboim causal · Kangrui Ruan, Junzhe Zhang, Xuan Di, Elias Bareinboim 2. Causal Eligibility Traces for Confounding Robust Off-Policy Evaluation — Other · score 90 · Semantic Scholar: Elias Bareinboim causal · Junzhe Zhang, Elias Bareinboim 3. Adaptive Parallel Reasoning: The Next Paradigm in Efficient Inference Scaling — Causal LMs · score 57 · BAIR Blog (UC Berkeley AI Research) 4. BiomedSciAI/causallib v0.10.0 — Other · score 55 · BiomedSciAI/causallib releases 5. amazon-science/azcausal v0.2.5 — VERSION 0.2.5 — Other · score 55 · amazon-science/azcausal releases
